mapper.update: UPDATE user_llm_config SET provider = #{userLlmConfig.provider}, api_key = #{userLlmConfig.apiKey}, base_url = #{userLlmConfig.baseUrl}, model_name = #{userLlmConfig.modelName}, temperature = #{userLlmConfig.temperature}, max_tokens = #{userLlmConfig.maxTokens} WHERE user_id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into user_llm_config (user_id, provider, api_key, base_url, model_name) VALUES (#{userId}, #{provider}, #{apiKey}, #{baseUrl}, #{modelName})
